page.title: Kits
page.subtitle: Save reusable bundles of skills, MCP servers, and rules — add them to any project in one click.
page.scopeHintGlobal: Kits live in projects, not in the global scope — showing your full library.
page.selectModeHint: Add selected Kits to a project, or bundle them into a new one.
page.searchTitle: Search by name, description, skill, MCP, or file name

installDialog.modeNew: Use a new folder (will register as a project)
installDialog.newFolderHint: If this folder isn't a project yet, it'll be registered after install.
installDialog.agentPickHelper: Choose every agent that should use these Kits.

toast.firstKitOnboarding: Click a Kit folder to see what's inside — then Apply to Project or start a new project with it.

editor.name: Name
editor.staleExtensionsDropped_one: 1 item removed from this Kit — its source is no longer on disk.
editor.staleExtensionsDropped_other: {{count}} items removed from this Kit — their source is no longer on disk.
editor.chipRailEmpty: Click a row below to add it to the Kit
editor.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, description, or kind

detail.deleteInstalledHeader_one: This Kit is currently installed in 1 project:
detail.deleteInstalledHeader_other: This Kit is currently installed in {{count}} projects:
detail.alsoUninstallAll_one: Also uninstall from that 1 project (removes {{files}} item(s))
detail.alsoUninstallAll_other: Also uninstall from those {{count}} projects (removes {{files}} item(s) total)
detail.notInstalled: Not installed in any project yet.
detail.removeFromHint: Pick which install to remove. The Kit itself stays in your library.
detail.sharedWarning_one: {{agents}} reads from the same folder — removing here will also remove these skills for it.
detail.sharedWarning_other: {{agents}} read from the same folder — removing here will also remove these skills for them.
detail.editPropagationHint: Editing a Kit doesn't update projects that already have it installed.

empty.title: No Kits yet
empty.subtitle: Bundle your favorite skills, MCP servers, CLI tools, and rules into a Kit you can drop into any project.
empty.scopeSubtitle: Switch to All scope to pick a Kit from your library and install it here.

error.duplicateName: A Kit with this name already exists

exportImport.importDescription: Pick or paste the path to a Kit archive (.hk-kit.zip).
exportImport.importExtensionError: Please select a .hk-kit.zip file (the path must end with .hk-kit.zip).
exportImport.exportDescription: Pick or paste a target folder for the Kit archive.
exportImport.exportHint: The file will be saved as <kit-name>.hk-kit.zip in this folder.

kitCorrupt.banner: Kit zip file is missing — this Kit is corrupt and only Delete is available.
